LCC-MS6-L4-1400P-MSMATH6-PCI-AAD-01 • MS Math Grade 6 • Ratios and Rates

The Two-Cup Mix

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students doing?
2QUESTION 2: Where is the recipe from?
3QUESTION 3: What will Marcus probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a full justification across all three answers. Name the program type, the recipe's family source, and the next step the guest takes. For each, cite the specific evidence in the dialogue and explain the reasoning that links the evidence to the answer.
